name: Over My Dead Body
timing: Play immediately after a friendly Soldier, Mercenary or Militia is slain.
description: Before the character is removed, it may make a bonus Melee Attack action against an enemy it's engaging. It does not need to spend energy and gains +2 Melee Stat, in addition to the usual +2 for attacking.
extraDescription: If a character would restore Wds as part of this bonus action they are still slain after resolving this melee.
